data.title: Repo docs for public editing: simplify DESIGN.md, add AGENTS.md, README.md, EDITING.md

data.body:
REVIEW (cold, agent:claude-fable-5-reviewer): Reviewed plan + full diff of DESIGN.md and new AGENTS.md/README.md/EDITING.md against the codebase. VERDICT: PASS with inline minor fixes (listed below, left uncommitted).

Verified: (1) DESIGN.md YAML frontmatter byte-identical — fences at lines 1/95, first diff hunk at line 98. (2) Body section order matches the google-labs template exactly: Overview, Colors, Typography, Layout, Elevation & Depth, Shapes, Components, Do's. (3) Zero don't-framed guidance and zero FRAC-NNN refs in the body (grep clean). (4) Code claims accurate: semantic type utilities all present in src/index.css:174-271; button sizes match button.tsx:71-72 (px-8 py-5 text-sm / px-4 py-2.5 text-xs); MandelbrotCorners safe-padding table matches sizeMap (xs 4/20, sm 6/30, md 8/45, lg 10/60); pennant polygon matches HouseBanner.tsx:124. (5) AGENTS.md lint claim verified: npx @google/design.md@0.2.0 lint = 0 errors, 28 warnings, all contrast/orphaned-token as documented. (6) README routes match App.tsx (omits dev-only /playground/badge — fine), commands match package.json, structure tree matches reality, port 5173 correct. (7) EDITING.md ~15 spot-checks pass: all quoted headlines (NeighborhoodPage, EventsPage, PeoplePage, PoliticalClubPage, Campus, LiberalArts, StoryPage), TALKS array, campusPhotos, LEFT_TEXT/RIGHT_TEXT, footer email, houses.ts taglines/PEOPLE/flags, lab-documents shape, storyPhotos, Hero placeholder, OriginStory diagram. (8) Cross-references across the four docs all point at existing files. (9) PRD check: no contradictions; mobile-first preserved throughout.

Inline fixes made by reviewer (uncommitted in worktree): (a) EDITING.md hero-bg source path corrected to assets-src/hero/fractal-background-source.png (script reads the hero/ subdir); (b) EDITING.md banner-swap recipe corrected to the real pipeline — masters go in assets-src/banners/ + pnpm build:banners; hand-replacing public/images/banners/*.webp bypassed the pipeline and masters must never live under public/ (FRAC-195 convention); (c) EDITING.md Pattern C category list completed with social/project; (d) EDITING.md two broken anchors #asset-swaps -> #pattern-e--asset-swaps; (e) MandelbrotCorners.tsx:64 comment updated to the renamed DESIGN.md heading 'Mandelbrot corners' (comment-only).

Validation: pnpm typecheck clean. pnpm test: 7 failures in 4 files (buttons, footer, navigation, neighborhood) — PRE-EXISTING: identical failures on master, and this branch's committed diff touches only .md/.lattice files. Flag for orchestrator: these 7 failing tests are not tracked in Lattice; consider creating a task. Acceptance criteria met. Recommend committing the reviewer's doc fixes and moving to done.
